name: Cracked Sash
description:
A Tediore shield that trades capacity for extremely fast recovery, with a very high recharge rate and an unusually short recharge delay. That makes it well suited to aggressive fights where you want your shield back almost immediately after it breaks.

It has no exclusive effect beyond its stat profile, and comparable purple Tediore shields can reach similar performance with the right parts.

special.description: Has very low capacity, but an exceptionally short recharge delay and a very fast recharge rate.

notes: Despite being treated as a unique item, its performance is largely reproducible with ordinary purple Tediore shields, which are usually easier to find. Its restricted part pool can also limit access to some elemental-resistance capacitors.
